{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Hariri Bidhaa{% endblock %} {% block content %}
Hariri Bidhaa: {{ product.name }}
{{ form.hidden_tag() }}
{{ form.name.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.name(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.price.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.price(class="form-control", step="100") }}
{{ form.quantity.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.quantity(class="form-control", step="0.01") }}
{{ form.unit.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.unit(class="form-select") }}
{{ form.expiry_date.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.expiry_date(class="form-control", type="date") }}
{{ form.low_stock_threshold.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.low_stock_threshold(class="form-control", step="0.01") }}
{{ form.image_url.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.image_url(class="form-control", placeholder="https://example.com/image.jpg") }}
{{ form.description.label(class="form-label small text-muted") }} {{ form.description(class="form-control", rows=3) }}
Ghairi
{% endblock %}
